message:
feat(firecracker): add MMDSNetworkConfig to MMDS metadata

MMDS can now include static IP configuration for VMs.
Changed meta-data to map[string]interface{} to support
nested network-config object.

Note: Named type MMDSNetworkConfig to avoid conflict with
existing NetworkConfig type in types.go.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
